mapper.sql: id, workspace_id, user_id, organization_id, status, valid_until, revision, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workspace_member (id, workspace_id, user_id, organization_id, status, valid_until, revision, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{workspaceId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{userId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{organizationId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{status, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.StringEnumTypeHandler}, #{validUntil, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, #{revision}, #{createdAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, #{updatedAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler})
mapper.update: UPDATE workspace_member SET organization_id = #{organizationId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, valid_until = #{validUntil, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, updated_at = #{now, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, revision = revision + 1 WHERE id = #{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revision = #{expectedRevision}
mapper.select: SELECT role_id AS id FROM workspace_member_role WHERE member_id = #{memberId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} ORDER BY role_id ASC
SELECT scope_id AS id FROM workspace_member_data_scope WHERE member_id = #{memberId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} ORDER BY scope_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE workspace_member SET status = 'REMOVED', updated_at = #{now, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, revision = revision + 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status IN ('ACTIVE', 'SUSPENDED')
